home.heroTitle: The Art of Touch for Your Well-being
home.heroSub: Professional therapeutic and restorative massage in Stockholm. Recover energy, relieve pain, and find deep relaxation.
home.aboutText: Welcome! My name is Oleg. I am a certified massage therapist with years of professional experience. My goal is to help you release muscle tension, recover from physical activity, and restore inner balance. In my practice, I combine classical techniques with modern rehabilitation methods, tailoring the approach to each individual client's needs.

exp.title: Professionalism
exp.desc: Deep anatomical knowledge and certified massage techniques.

ind.title: Individual Approach
ind.desc: Selecting the optimal technique tailored to your specific needs and goals.

atm.title: Premium Atmosphere
atm.desc: A cozy treatment room, relaxing music, aromatherapy, and absolute comfort.

services.title: Services & Prices
services.sub: Choose the perfect treatment to restore your body and mind

classic.name: Classic Massage
classic.shortDesc: Effective target muscle work, release of accumulated stress, enhanced circulation, and restoration of physical tone.
classic.longDesc: Classic massage in Stockholm by certified therapist Oleg is a fundamental therapy to restore your body's natural balance. Grounded in traditional Swedish massage techniques including effleurage, petrissage, friction, and vibration, this treatment reaches deep into muscle layers and joints. The session begins with a gentle warming of the skin before transitioning to targeted pressure on trigger points in the back, neck, and shoulder area where tension accumulates. The physiological effects include increased blood flow, enhanced lymphatic drainage, and optimized oxygen delivery to tissues. This therapy effectively counters the strain of sedentary desk work, relieves muscle spasms, eases tension headaches, and stabilizes emotional well-being by reducing stress. For maximum therapeutic benefit, combining it with lymphatic drainage massage is highly recommended.
benefits: Relieves fatigue and tension headaches
Improves blood circulation and microcirculation
Eliminates muscle spasms and stiffness
Enhances overall body tone and flexibility

anti-cellulite.name: Anti-Cellulite Massage
anti-cellulite.shortDesc: Intense manual reshaping of problem areas, lymphatic system stimulation, fluid retention release, and skin texture smoothing.
anti-cellulite.longDesc: Professional anti-cellulite massage in Stockholm focuses on deep manipulation of subcutaneous fat tissues in target zones such as thighs, buttocks, and abdomen. Oleg employs specialized techniques of intense kneading, rolling, and cupping movements that stimulate local cellular metabolism. The treatment promotes the synthesis of natural collagen and elastin, helping the skin look firm, tight, and smooth. This massage effectively breaks down fibrous tissue connections, improves microcirculation, and accelerates the evacuation of excess interstitial fluid to eliminate the 'orange peel' appearance. The session features a preparation stage to warm the tissues followed by deep focal work using premium organic oils. For long-term visible results, a course of 8–10 sessions is recommended, ideally interspersed with lymphatic drainage treatments.
benefits: Effective contouring of target body areas
Reduces fluid retention and swelling
Improves skin firmness and elasticity
Stimulates lymphatic drainage and metabolism

sports.name: Sports Massage
sports.shortDesc: Deep tissue and structural massage to prepare muscles for athletic load, speed up recovery, and prevent sports injuries.
sports.longDesc: Sports massage in Stockholm by Oleg is specifically designed for athletes and individuals with highly active lifestyles. This technique focuses on deep, intensive structural work on major muscle groups, tendons, and ligaments. Utilizing robust strokes of wringing, deep kneading, and passive stretching, the treatment effectively releases hypertonicity and relieves intense muscle spasms from workouts. It accelerates the removal of lactic acid and metabolic waste, reducing muscle soreness (DOMS). The procedure enhances overall muscle elasticity, joint range of motion, and physical endurance. The session is customized to support your specific sport and current training cycle. For ultimate athletic recovery, it works exceptionally well when paired with cupping therapy.
benefits: Accelerates muscle recovery after workouts
Releases muscle hypertonicity and pain
Enhances elasticity of muscles and tendons
Effective prevention of athletic injuries

lymphatic-drainage.name: Lymphatic Drainage Massage
lymphatic-drainage.shortDesc: Gentle detox therapy to stimulate lymphatic flow, reduce swelling, support the immune system, and cleanse the body.
lymphatic-drainage.longDesc: Lymphatic drainage massage in Stockholm is a specialized, gentle manual therapy aimed at accelerating the flow of lymph fluid. Oleg utilizes light, rhythmic, wave-like strokes in the precise direction of your body's natural lymphatic pathways. This gentle pressure stimulates lymph nodes and speeds up the elimination of metabolic waste, toxins, and excess cellular fluid. The treatment triggers deep parasympathetic nervous system relaxation, boosts immune response, regulates sleep patterns, and visibly improves skin quality by reducing puffiness in the face and limbs. It serves as a vital component in detox, weight loss, and post-injury rehabilitation programs. To maximize detoxification, consider alternating it with sports or anti-cellulite massage.
benefits: Deep detoxification and waste removal
Fast reduction of facial and limb swelling
Normalizes lymphatic flow and circulation
Strengthens immunity and brings body lightness

cupping.name: Cupping Therapy
cupping.shortDesc: Vacuum-assisted therapy for deep myofascial release, improved tissue nutrition, and localized back pain relief.
cupping.longDesc: Cupping therapy in Stockholm is a time-tested technique of localized vacuum stimulation. Oleg applies specialized medical-grade silicone or glass cups to create controlled suction on the skin of the back and other areas. The vacuum effect draws a rich supply of oxygenated blood to deep muscle groups and fascial layers that are difficult to reach through manual touch alone. This pressure releases stiff myofascial restrictions, enhances local nutrition, and activates natural tissue healing and metabolite removal. The treatment is highly effective for chronic back pain, postural strain, and respiratory recovery. After a session, rest and warmth are advised. It is an excellent recovery booster when integrated with sports massage.
benefits: Deep release of fascia and trigger points
Significant relief of localized back pain
Activates natural cellular regeneration
Improves blood flow in deep tissue layers

hot-stone.name: Hot Stone Massage
hot-stone.shortDesc: Premium thermal therapy using volcanic basalt stones to melt away deep muscular tension and ease mental exhaustion.
hot-stone.longDesc: Hot stone massage in Stockholm is a premium spa ritual that combines smooth manual strokes with deep thermal therapy. Oleg utilizes smooth, heated volcanic basalt stones that retain therapeutic heat for a long duration. Warmed to a comfortable 45–55°C, the stones are placed on key energy pathways and swept along the body in long, relaxing strokes. This deep heat penetrates up to 3-4 cm into muscle tissue, dilating blood vessels, boosting local circulation, and instantly melting away rigid spasms. The session delivers a powerful grounding and anti-stress effect, calming the nervous system, combating chronic burnout, and restoring natural sleep cycles. It is the ultimate choice for mental reset at the end of a busy week.
benefits: Complete release of mental stress and fatigue
Deep warming of muscles and joint areas
Normalizes sleep cycles and body biorhythms
Eases anxiety and signs of burn-out

turkish-foam.name: Turkish Foam Massage
turkish-foam.shortDesc: Traditional soap massage in a cloud of warm olive soap foam with Kese mitt exfoliation for deep skin renewal.
turkish-foam.longDesc: Turkish foam massage in Stockholm is a luxurious spa ritual of purification and absolute relaxation. The treatment starts with a deep thermal warming phase, followed by a full-body exfoliation using a traditional Kese mitt made from natural silk or goat hair. This process gently lifts away dead skin cells, opens pores, and prepares the tissues to absorb nutrients. Next, a special cotton bag is swept through the air to generate a vast cloud of warm foam made from natural olive oil soap. Within this warm cloud, the therapist performs a soothing, muscle-melting massage that relieves physical tension and brings a sensation of weightlessness. Woven perfectly together, it can be combined with natural herbal massage for a complete body treatment.
benefits: Deep exfoliation and pore purification
Improves skin smoothness and softness
Eases tension in superficial muscle layers
Brings a feeling of absolute lightness and purity

natural-massage.name: Natural Herbal Massage
natural-massage.shortDesc: Signature holistic massage using cold-pressed botanical oils and warm herbal compress bags to soothe joints and restore energy.
natural-massage.longDesc: Signature natural herbal massage in Stockholm by Oleg is a holistic therapy integrating pure organic ingredients with gentle osteopathic massage techniques. The session opens with a mindful inhalation of pure essential oils tailored to your emotional state. Oleg then gently warms the body using steamed cotton compress bags filled with therapeutic Nordic herbs. As the herbal compresses release their natural heat and botanical compounds, they soothe muscle stiffness, ease joint discomfort, and nourish the skin. This warm stage is followed by a manual massage using premium cold-pressed oils, sealing in the therapeutic benefits and leaving you in a state of absolute peace. Highly recommended after a Turkish foam massage.
benefits: Deep warming of muscles and joint ligaments
Intensive calming aromatherapy effects
Releases nervous tension and spasms
Nourishes skin with natural herbal extracts

testimonials.title: Client Reviews
testimonials.sub: What clients say about their experience with Oleg

items.name: Johan Andersson
items.text: Excellent sports massage! Oleg has a deep understanding of anatomy and helped me recover quickly after my marathon. Highly recommended!

items.name: Maria Nilsson
items.text: Classic massage by Oleg is the best remedy for neck and back pain after a long week of desk work. Extremely professional and gentle.

items.name: Elena Petrova
items.text: Hot stone massage was pure bliss. Total relaxation and reset. The treatment room is clean, cozy, and very comfortable.
